name: UI
about: UI / layout / design improvement
title: ""
labels: ui
assignees: ""
---

## Description
Describe the UI issue or requested improvement.

---

## Current Behavior
What currently looks wrong or behaves incorrectly in the UI?

---

## Expected Behavior
How should the UI look or behave after the fix?

---

## Affected Page / Component
Specify the page, section, or component.

Example:
- Loans page
- Expenses table
- Shopping List form

---

## Type of UI Change

- [ ] Layout fix
- [ ] Spacing / alignment
- [ ] Responsive design
- [ ] Typography
- [ ] Colors / styling
- [ ] Form usability
- [ ] Table / list display

---

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] UI matches the rest of the application
- [ ] Layout is aligned correctly
- [ ] Responsive behavior works properly
- [ ] No visual breaking issues
- [ ] No console errors

---

## Screenshots / References
Add screenshot or reference if relevant.

---

## Technical Notes
Optional technical notes.
